# Stillwater — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Stillwater is a local yoga studio with a serene, peaceful brand identity. The name evokes tranquility and mindfulness, and the desired website aesthetic — calm and airy — reflects a space where clients can find stillness and balance. The studio offers structured classes with transparent pricing and a personal touch through instructor profiles, paired with the convenience of online booking.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover serenity at Stillwater, your local yoga studio inspired by the stillness of an evolutions fitness &amp; wellness center. Explore airy spaces and mindful practice. Begin your journey to balance today.

### Classes & Pricing
https://example.com/classes-pricing
Browse our structured yoga classes with clear, upfront pricing at Stillwater. From gentle flow to deep restoration, find a session that fits your path at this middle branch fitness and wellness center. Book your mat now.

### Instructors
https://example.com/instructors
Connect with the caring instructors who make Stillwater a true march wellness and fitness center. Each profile reflects a personal commitment to guiding your stillness. Find your teacher and deepen your practice.

### Contact & Booking
https://example.com/contact-booking
Ready to embrace tranquility? Contact Stillwater or book online instantly, bringing the ease of a uhealth fitness &amp; wellness center to your fingertips. Secure your spot in our serene studio today.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact-booking
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Stillwater
Stillwater is a local yoga studio with a serene, peaceful brand identity. The name evokes tranquility and mindfulness, and the desired website aesthetic — calm and airy — reflects a space where clients can find stillness and balance. The studio offers structured classes with transparent pricing and a personal touch through instructor profiles, paired with the convenience of online booking.

## Target Audience
- Wellness Enthusiasts
- Beginners Yoga Seekers
- Mindful Millennials

## Industry
Fitness & Wellness

---

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
